ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable English-first pinyin completion in supported editors.
ast.target: 在支持的编辑器中启用英语优先的拼音补全。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Main Rime dictionary file. Supports import_tables from that file.
ast.target: 主 Rime 字典文件。支持从该文件导入 import_tables。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-parse the Rime dictionary and refresh the cached index.
ast.target: 重新解析 Rime 字典并刷新缓存索引。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show candidates whenever the current English token can be parsed as pinyin.
ast.target: 当当前英文词元可被解析为拼音时，显示候选词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: First Space remains a normal space. Press Space again within the timeout to replace the previous pinyin token with the first candidate.
ast.target: 第一个空格保持为普通空格。在超时时间内再次按空格键，将用第一个候选词替换之前的拼音词元。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum interval in milliseconds between the two Space presses.
ast.target: 两次按空格键之间的最大间隔（毫秒）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, double Space turns `woaini  ` into `我爱你 ` instead of `我爱你`.
ast.target: 启用后，双击空格键会将 `woaini  ` 变为 `我爱你 ` 而不是 `我爱你`。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure the shortcuts used to pick candidates and turn pages.
ast.target: 配置用于选择候选词和翻页的快捷键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shortcut for the second candidate in the current page.
ast.target: 当前页面第二个候选词的快捷键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shortcut for the third candidate in the current page.
ast.target: 当前页面第三个候选词的快捷键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shortcut for the fourth candidate in the current page.
ast.target: 当前页面第四个候选词的快捷键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shortcut for the fifth candidate in the current page. Ctrl-[ may be interpreted as Escape by the system, so changing it is recommended if it conflicts.
ast.target: 当前页面第五个候选词的快捷键。Ctrl-[ 可能被系统解释为 Escape，因此如果冲突，建议更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shortcut for moving to the previous candidate page.
ast.target: 移动到上一个候选词页面的快捷键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Shortcut for moving to the next candidate page.
ast.target: 移动到下一个候选词页面的快捷键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do not show pinyin candidates inside fenced code blocks.
ast.target: 不要在围栏代码块内显示拼音候选词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do not show pinyin candidates inside backtick code spans.
ast.target: 不要在反引号代码跨度内显示拼音候选词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do not show pinyin candidates inside inline or block math.
ast.target: 不要在行内或块级数学公式内显示拼音候选词。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 双击空格键选择第一个候选词

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Keep space after Double Space selection
ast.target: 双击空格键选择后保留空格

ast.name: name
ast.target: 重建 Rime 字典索引
